name: Chocolate Mint Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (180°C).
2. Cream Golden Crisco shortening, sugar, cocoa powder, and egg until smooth. Stir in flour, mixing until well blended.
3. Press firmly with hands into a 13 x 9-inch (33 x 23 cm) cake pan.
4. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 10 minutes, or until dry.
Topping:
5. Combine coconut, almonds, and chocolate chips. Sprinkle over the base.
6. Combine sweetened condensed milk and mint extract. Pour evenly over top.
7. Return to oven and bake for an additional 20-25 minutes, or until golden. Cool, cut into bars.
Ease of Baking: Easy
Preparation Time: 15 minutes
Baking Time: 35 minutes
Makes: About 36 bars
Freezing: Excellent
